--!strict
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local model = script.Parent
local door = model:WaitForChild("Door")
local pivot = model:WaitForChild("SlidePivot")
local toggleEvent = model:WaitForChild("ToggleDoor") :: RemoteEvent

-- CONFIG
local SLIDE_DISTANCE = 19       -- studs que se mueve
local SLIDE_TIME = 3
local COOLDOWN = 0.20

-- Dirección local:
--  +1 = derecha local del pivot
--  -1 = izquierda local del pivot
local SLIDE_DIRECTION = -1

-- Estado
local isOpen = false
local busy = false

-- Guardar posición cerrada
local closedCF = door.CFrame

local function tweenDoorTo(targetCF: CFrame, time, style, direction)
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
		time or SLIDE_TIME,
		style or Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
		direction or Enum.EasingDirection.Out
	)

	local tween = TweenService:Create(door, tweenInfo, { CFrame = targetCF })
	tween:Play()
	tween.Completed:Wait()
end

local function getOpenCFrame()
	-- Movimiento relativo al pivot, no al mundo
	local right = pivot.CFrame.RightVector
	local offset = right * (SLIDE_DISTANCE * SLIDE_DIRECTION)
	return closedCF + offset
end

-- 🔑 ADAPTACIÓN CLAVE: RemoteEvent
toggleEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
	if busy then return end
	busy = true

	-- Refrescar posición cerrada si estaba cerrada
	if not isOpen then
		closedCF = door.CFrame
	end

	if isOpen then
		-- Cerrar
		tweenDoorTo(
			closedCF,
			SLIDE_TIME,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quart,
			Enum.EasingDirection.InOut
		)
		isOpen = false
	else
		-- Abrir
		local openCF = getOpenCFrame()
		tweenDoorTo(
			openCF,
			SLIDE_TIME,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
			Enum.EasingDirection.Out
		)
		isOpen = true
	end

	task.wait(COOLDOWN)
	busy = false
end)

--!strict
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local model = script.Parent
local door = model:WaitForChild("Door")
local hinge = model:WaitForChild("Hinge")
local toggleEvent = model:WaitForChild("ToggleDoor") :: RemoteEvent

-- CONFIG
local OPEN_ANGLE = -90
local COOLDOWN = 0.25
local OPEN_TIME = 1

local isOpen = false
local busy = false

local hingeCF = hinge.CFrame
local closedDoorCF = door.CFrame

local function getDoorCFrame(angleDeg)
	local rot = CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(angleDeg), 0)
	local relative = hingeCF:ToObjectSpace(closedDoorCF)
	return hingeCF:ToWorldSpace(rot * relative)
end

local function setDoorCFrameSmooth(targetCF, time)
	local tween = TweenService:Create(
		door,
		TweenInfo.new(time, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
		{ CFrame = targetCF }
	)
	tween:Play()
	tween.Completed:Wait()
end

local function toggleDoor()
	if busy then return end
	busy = true

	if not isOpen then
		closedDoorCF = door.CFrame
		hingeCF = hinge.CFrame
		setDoorCFrameSmooth(getDoorCFrame(OPEN_ANGLE), OPEN_TIME)
		isOpen = true
	else
		setDoorCFrameSmooth(closedDoorCF, OPEN_TIME)
		isOpen = false
	end

	task.wait(COOLDOWN)
	busy = false
end

-- 🔑 AQUÍ ESTÁ LA CLAVE
toggleEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
	print("🚪 ToggleDoor recibido desde:", player.Name)
	toggleDoor()
end)

local OPEN_ANGLE = -90
local COOLDOWN = 0.25
local OPEN_TIME = 1

local isOpen = false
local busy = false

local hingeCF = hinge.CFrame
local closedDoorCF = door.CFrame

local function getDoorCFrame(angleDeg)
	local rot = CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(angleDeg), 0)
	local relative = hingeCF:ToObjectSpace(closedDoorCF)
	return hingeCF:ToWorldSpace(rot * relative)
end

local function setDoorCFrameSmooth(targetCF, time)
	local tween = TweenService:Create(
		door,
		TweenInfo.new(time, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
		{ CFrame = targetCF }
	)
	tween:Play()
	tween.Completed:Wait()
end

local function toggleDoor()
	if busy then return end
	busy = true

	if not isOpen then
		closedDoorCF = door.CFrame
		hingeCF = hinge.CFrame
		setDoorCFrameSmooth(getDoorCFrame(OPEN_ANGLE), OPEN_TIME)
		isOpen = true
	else
		setDoorCFrameSmooth(closedDoorCF, OPEN_TIME)
		isOpen = false
	end

	task.wait(COOLDOWN)
	busy = false
end

-- 🔑 AQUÍ ESTÁ LA CLAVE
toggleEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
	print("🚪 ToggleDoor recibido desde:", player.Name)
	toggleDoor()
end)

--!strict
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local model = script.Parent
local door = model:WaitForChild("Door")
local pivot = model:WaitForChild("SlidePivot")
local toggleEvent = model:WaitForChild("ToggleDoor") :: RemoteEvent

-- CONFIG
local SLIDE_DISTANCE = 6        -- studs que se mueve
local SLIDE_TIME = 1
local COOLDOWN = 0.20

-- Dirección local:
--  +1 = derecha local del pivot
--  -1 = izquierda local del pivot
local SLIDE_DIRECTION = -1

-- Estado
local isOpen = false
local busy = false

-- Guardar posición cerrada
local closedCF = door.CFrame

local function tweenDoorTo(targetCF: CFrame, time, style, direction)
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
		time or SLIDE_TIME,
		style or Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
		direction or Enum.EasingDirection.Out
	)

	local tween = TweenService:Create(door, tweenInfo, { CFrame = targetCF })
	tween:Play()
	tween.Completed:Wait()
end

local function getOpenCFrame()
	-- Movimiento relativo al pivot, no al mundo
	local right = pivot.CFrame.RightVector
	local offset = right * (SLIDE_DISTANCE * SLIDE_DIRECTION)
	return closedCF + offset
end

-- 🔑 ADAPTACIÓN CLAVE: RemoteEvent
toggleEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
	if busy then return end
	busy = true

	-- Refrescar posición cerrada si estaba cerrada
	if not isOpen then
		closedCF = door.CFrame
	end

	if isOpen then
		-- Cerrar
		tweenDoorTo(
			closedCF,
			SLIDE_TIME,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quart,
			Enum.EasingDirection.InOut
		)
		isOpen = false
	else
		-- Abrir
		local openCF = getOpenCFrame()
		tweenDoorTo(
			openCF,
			SLIDE_TIME,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
			Enum.EasingDirection.Out
		)
		isOpen = true
	end

	task.wait(COOLDOWN)
	busy = false
end)

--!strict
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local model = script.Parent
local door = model:WaitForChild("Door")
local hinge = model:WaitForChild("Hinge")
local toggleEvent = model:WaitForChild("ToggleDoor") :: RemoteEvent

-- CONFIG
local OPEN_ANGLE = -90
local COOLDOWN = 0.25
local OPEN_TIME = 1

local isOpen = false
local busy = false

local hingeCF = hinge.CFrame
local closedDoorCF = door.CFrame

local function getDoorCFrame(angleDeg)
	local rot = CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(angleDeg), 0)
	local relative = hingeCF:ToObjectSpace(closedDoorCF)
	return hingeCF:ToWorldSpace(rot * relative)
end

local function setDoorCFrameSmooth(targetCF, time)
	local tween = TweenService:Create(
		door,
		TweenInfo.new(time, Enum.EasingStyle.Quint, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
		{ CFrame = targetCF }
	)
	tween:Play()
	tween.Completed:Wait()
end

local function toggleDoor()
	if busy then return end
	busy = true

	if not isOpen then
		closedDoorCF = door.CFrame
		hingeCF = hinge.CFrame
		setDoorCFrameSmooth(getDoorCFrame(OPEN_ANGLE), OPEN_TIME)
		isOpen = true
	else
		setDoorCFrameSmooth(closedDoorCF, OPEN_TIME)
		isOpen = false
	end

	task.wait(COOLDOWN)
	busy = false
end

-- 🔑 AQUÍ ESTÁ LA CLAVE
toggleEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
	print("🚪 ToggleDoor recibido desde:", player.Name)
	toggleDoor()
end)

--!strict
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local model = script.Parent
local door = model:WaitForChild("Door")
local pivot = model:WaitForChild("SlidePivot")
local toggleEvent = model:WaitForChild("ToggleDoor") :: RemoteEvent

-- CONFIG
local SLIDE_DISTANCE = 8        -- studs que se mueve
local SLIDE_TIME = 1
local COOLDOWN = 0.20

-- Dirección local:
--  +1 = derecha local del pivot
--  -1 = izquierda local del pivot
local SLIDE_DIRECTION = -1

-- Estado
local isOpen = false
local busy = false

-- Guardar posición cerrada
local closedCF = door.CFrame

local function tweenDoorTo(targetCF: CFrame, time, style, direction)
	local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
		time or SLIDE_TIME,
		style or Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
		direction or Enum.EasingDirection.Out
	)

	local tween = TweenService:Create(door, tweenInfo, { CFrame = targetCF })
	tween:Play()
	tween.Completed:Wait()
end

local function getOpenCFrame()
	-- Movimiento relativo al pivot, no al mundo
	local right = pivot.CFrame.RightVector
	local offset = right * (SLIDE_DISTANCE * SLIDE_DIRECTION)
	return closedCF + offset
end

-- 🔑 ADAPTACIÓN CLAVE: RemoteEvent
toggleEvent.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
	if busy then return end
	busy = true

	-- Refrescar posición cerrada si estaba cerrada
	if not isOpen then
		closedCF = door.CFrame
	end

	if isOpen then
		-- Cerrar
		tweenDoorTo(
			closedCF,
			SLIDE_TIME,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quart,
			Enum.EasingDirection.InOut
		)
		isOpen = false
	else
		-- Abrir
		local openCF = getOpenCFrame()
		tweenDoorTo(
			openCF,
			SLIDE_TIME,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
			Enum.EasingDirection.Out
		)
		isOpen = true
	end

	task.wait(COOLDOWN)
	busy = false
end)
